# AI Status Hub Copilot Instructions

通用项目 skills 位于 `.skills/`。处理相关任务时，请参考：

- Release/package/version work: `.skills/vscode-extension-release-workflow/SKILL.md` and `.skills/version-bump-rules/SKILL.md`
- Formatting/display helpers: `.skills/reusable-format-functions/SKILL.md`
- Complex reusable functions: `.skills/test-driven-function/SKILL.md`
- Encoding and line endings: `.skills/safe-utf8-file-ops/SKILL.md` and `.skills/line-endings/SKILL.md`
- Chinese communication: `.skills/chinese-first/SKILL.md`

Also follow `AGENTS.md` for release order, design-document sync, and project coding rules.
